title: Cozy Chewy Irish Daikon Bake
description: A savory, chewy, and comforting Irish dish featuring daikon, tandoor, and shojin-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Daikon Radish
ingredients.notes: Peel and slice into 1/4 inch thick rounds

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the daikon, tandoori spice mix, cumin, coriander, ginger, and garlic.
Mix well until the daikon is evenly coated with the spice mixture.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the daikon mixture and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Transfer the daikon mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the yogurt, coconut milk, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the yogurt mixture over the daikon mixture in the baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the daikon is tender and the top is lightly browned.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro, if desired.
